title: Profile: Publishing
summary: Default publishing values and public author-space settings.

sections.title: Default content type
sections.markdown: Used when you open the composer for new content. Choose whether new work starts as a post or a page.

sections.title: Default save status
sections.markdown: Controls whether new content starts with **Published** or **Unpublished** as its default saved status.

sections.title: Aggregate new posts to the root stream by default
sections.markdown: Applies only to new posts. Pages ignore aggregation.

sections.title: Scope of these defaults
sections.markdown: These settings affect new content opened from the composer. They do not retroactively change existing saved content.

sections.title: Author space
sections.markdown: This section also controls author-space presentation, including the author landing page and the optional author background override.

sections.title: Secret links
sections.markdown: If the site allows secret links, you can generate a private link for your author space here without making the whole site public.
